---
title: "Sage"
subtitle: "An Agentic AI Nutritionist"
pagetitle: "Sage · Agentic AI Nutritionist"
author:
  - name: Tyler Blue
  - name: Andrew Moy
date: "April 24, 2026"
---

::: {.lead}
A multi-agent meal-planning system that combines persistent user memory with grounded recipe retrieval and a deterministic audit layer. Built for Georgetown University DSAN 6725, Spring 2026.
:::

## In brief

Meal-planning apps tend to fall into one of two modes: manual trackers that burden the user with data entry, or fully generative AI systems that sacrifice nutritional reliability for friction reduction. Sage sits between the two poles, using a multi-agent pipeline built on the Strands Agent SDK to combine conversational interaction with persistent cross-session memory and nutritionally grounded plan generation.

The orchestrator agent routes user intent to two specialized sub-agents, an intake agent that maintains the user profile through natural conversation, and a planning agent that assembles meal plans from a curated recipe database. Nutritional targets are computed deterministically, dietary restrictions are enforced through a deterministic audit layer, and every plan is drawn from validated recipes rather than generated freely.

---

## Learn About Sage

::: {.deliverables-grid}

::: {.deliverable}
### Paper
A conference-style paper covering motivation, related work, system architecture, data, evaluation, and findings.

[Read the paper (PDF)](final_paper.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.deliverable}
### Code
Full source, including agent definitions, tool implementations, evaluation harness, and data pipeline.

[Browse the repository](https://github.com/gu-dsan6725/spring-2026-final-project-team_07){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.deliverable}
### Slides
Presentation deck walking through the problem, architecture, evaluation results, and key takeaways.

[View slides (PDF)](slide_deck_print.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.deliverable}
### Poster
48" × 36" conference poster summarizing the system and results.

[View poster (PDF)](poster.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.deliverable .deliverable-wide}
### Demo
Walkthrough of Sage handling a multi-turn conversation: profile setup, meal planning, and shopping list generation.

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%" style="border-radius: 6px; margin-top: 0.5rem;">
  <source src="sage_demo.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  Your browser does not support embedded video. <a href="sage_demo.mp4">Download the demo video</a>.
</video>
:::

:::

---

## Authors

**Tyler Blue** and **Andrew Moy**, M.S. Data Science & Analytics, Georgetown University.

DSAN 6725, Spring 2026. Instructor: Professor Amit Arora.
